title: Viners Atlanta 16 Piece Cutlery Set Stainless Steel, Brushed Satin Finish Includes Knives, Forks, Spoons Rust-Resistant, Dishwasher Safe Ideal for Home, Party, Restaurant
features: 16 PIECE CUTLERY SET | Includes 4 table knives, 4 table forks, 4 teaspoons, and 4 dessert spoons—perfect for everyday dining and special occasions.
PREMIUM STAINLESS STEEL | Made from high-quality 18.0 stainless steel with a polished mirror finish, ensuring durability, strength, and long-lasting performance.
ELEGANT & MODERN DESIGN | Slender handles with a brushed satin finish add a sophisticated touch to any dining table, making it ideal for home, parties, and restaurants.
RUST-RESISTANT & DISHWASHER SAFE | Designed for everyday convenience, this cutlery set is easy to clean and built to resist rust and corrosion.
25 YEAR GUARANTEE | Crafted for longevity, this high-quality set comes with a 25-year manufacturer-backed guarantee, offering peace of mind.
VINERS HERITAGE | With over 110 years of expertise, Viners is a trusted British brand known for its timeless craftsmanship and commitment to excellence in cutlery.
